title: Spaceward Expansion
body:
# 📖 What's this Mod?
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bf1a1fe15068c018495169300efe0b75677709c.png)
This mod will add all sorts of moons and planets that will challenge the player to adjust to different conditions and environments to survive in the great expanse of space. Developers can add their own custom planets through data packs. 
Make sure to report Bugs to the tracker and recommend Features!!!

## ✅ Features:
- Space Suit (With custom player inventory when equipment for Parachutes and Oxygen Tanks)
- Parachutes
- Dynamic Canister (Acts as Oxygen Tank to breathe in Space & Fluid Containers)
- Canister Fillers (Goes Above Tanks to Fill Empty Canisters)
- Fluid Tanks
- Fluid Pipes
- Oxygen Collecter (Place in Oxygenated worlds or around Oxygen Producing blocks/plants)
- Moon (Access by going above y 400 or change in config)
- Configurability (Datapack Tags)
- Custom Planet Creation through Datapacks

## 📷 Screenshots
![Standing on Moon with Earth Behind Player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XCSfuQVK/images/5e36f8c444c65a4856ff0c8fcaedb60b9dd52c20.png)

## 📋 Planned Features:
- Fabric/Forge Versions
- Improved Moon
- Model Rockets + Custom Rockets
- More Planets
- Better Planet Gen

## ❗Warning
Currently uses Mixin to override Player Inventory to add two slots. One for Oxygen Canisters and the other for Parachutes so may break with other mods. New System under development to fix.

# Installation
Fabric Version Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

Optional - JEI Compatability
